# RSA Encryption in Kotlin

Here's a complete example of RSA encryption implementation in Kotlin:

```kotlin
import java.math.BigInteger
import java.security.SecureRandom

class RSA {
    private val bitLength = 512
    private val random = SecureRandom()
    
    // RSA key pair
    data class KeyPair(val publicKey: BigInteger, val privateKey: BigInteger, val modulus: BigInteger)
    
    // Generate RSA key pair
    fun generateKeyPair(): KeyPair {
        val p = BigInteger.probablePrime(bitLength / 2, random)
        val q = BigInteger.probablePrime(bitLength / 2, random)
        val n = p.multiply(q)
        val phi = p.subtract(BigInteger.ONE).multiply(q.subtract(BigInteger.ONE))
        val e = BigInteger.valueOf(65537) // Common public exponent
        val d = e.modInverse(phi)
        
        return KeyPair(e, d, n)
    }
    
    // Encrypt message using RSA
    fun encrypt(message: String, publicKey: BigInteger, modulus: BigInteger): BigInteger {
        val messageBytes = message.toByteArray()
        val messageBigInt = BigInteger(1, messageBytes)
        return messageBigInt.modPow(publicKey, modulus)
    }
    
    // Decrypt message using RSA
    fun decrypt(ciphertext: BigInteger, privateKey: BigInteger, modulus: BigInteger): String {
        val decryptedBigInt = ciphertext.modPow(privateKey, modulus)
        val decryptedBytes = decryptedBigInt.toByteArray()
        return String(decryptedBytes)
    }
    
    // Simple string encryption
    fun encryptString(message: String, publicKey: BigInteger, modulus: BigInteger): String {
        val encrypted = encrypt(message, publicKey, modulus)
        return encrypted.toString()
    }
    
    // Simple string decryption
    fun decryptString(encryptedString: String, privateKey: BigInteger, modulus: BigInteger): String {
        val ciphertext = BigInteger(encryptedString)
        return decrypt(ciphertext, privateKey, modulus)
    }
}

fun main() {
    val rsa = RSA()
    
    // Generate key pair
    val keyPair = rsa.generateKeyPair()
    println("Public Key: ${keyPair.publicKey}")
    println("Private Key: ${keyPair.privateKey}")
    println("Modulus: ${keyPair.modulus}")
    println()
    
    // Original message
    val originalMessage = "Hello, RSA Encryption!"
    println("Original Message: $originalMessage")
    println()
    
    // Encrypt the message
    val encrypted = rsa.encryptString(originalMessage, keyPair.publicKey, keyPair.modulus)
    println("Encrypted Message: $encrypted")
    println()
    
    // Decrypt the message
    val decrypted = rsa.decryptString(encrypted, keyPair.privateKey, keyPair.modulus)
    println("Decrypted Message: $decrypted")
    println()
    
    // Verify the result
    println("Encryption/Decryption successful: ${originalMessage == decrypted}")
}
```

## Output Example:
```
Public Key: 65537
Private Key:
